headline: Morgan Stanley AI Assistant reaches 98% advisor adoption — highest in the industry
summary: Morgan Stanley's AI @ Morgan Stanley Assistant — built on OpenAI — has reached 98% adoption among its 15,000+ wealth management advisors, making it the highest adoption rate of any AI productivity tool in the financial services industry. The AI Debrief tool auto-generates meeting notes and syncs directly to Salesforce CRM, saving advisors up to 15 hours per week. Document retrieval efficiency has jumped from 20% to 80% since deployment.
